title: Event Media Cloud (Immich)
description: A private, self-hosted photo and video sharing platform provided to clients for weddings and events. Guests can seamlessly upload high-resolution media directly to the server via a custom QR code.

title: Secure File Exchange
description: A high-speed, self-hosted file sharing platform utilizing Pingvin Share, designed for secure, private data transfers without relying on third-party cloud limits.

title: Enterprise Home Lab & VPN
description: Advanced network architecture featuring a double-NAT MikroTik setup to provide secure, encrypted remote VPN access to internal server environments and services.

title: VoIP Telephony Server
description: Fully configured and virtualized FreePBX system handling internal communications routing and SIP trunking, with a strictly isolated management interface for security.

title: RideLink
description: An IoT mobile application project built for vehicle navigation and real-time notifications, utilizing an ESP32 microcontroller to interface with an external display.

title: TheseusCheckIn
description: A desktop visitor management application built with Java and Maven. Features a robust MVC architecture, SQL database integration, and a packaged Windows installer.
